title: Has Many
description: The target model has a foreign key pointing to the source model's primary key. Returns a collection. Example: a Post has many Comments — comments.post_id → posts.id.

methodName.title: Method Name
methodName.description: camelCase PHP method on the source model returning the related collection. E.g. 'comments' for $post->comments().

foreignKey.title: Foreign Key
foreignKey.description: Column on the target model's table that holds the reference back to the source. E.g. 'post_id'.

ownerKey.title: Owner Key
ownerKey.description: Primary key column on the source model's table. Usually 'id'.
